from target import parse_ipv4

def test_parse_ipv4():
    # Normal case
    assert parse_ipv4("192.168.0.1") == (192, 168, 0, 1)
    # Edge case: maximum valid octet values
    assert parse_ipv4("255.255.255.255") == (255, 255, 255, 255)
    # Invalid cases
    import pytest
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("10.0.0")          # not enough octets
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("10.0.0.0.1")      # too many octets
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("01.2.3.4")        # leading zero
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("256.0.0.0")       # out of range
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("a.b.c.d")         # non‑digit characters
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("...")             # empty octets

from target import parse_ipv4

def test_parse_ipv4():
    # Normal case
    assert parse_ipv4("192.168.0.1") == (192, 168, 0, 1)
    # Edge case: maximum valid octet values
    assert parse_ipv4("255.255.255.255") == (255, 255, 255, 255)
    # Invalid inputs raise ValueError
    import pytest
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("192.168.1")          # too few octets
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("10.0.0.256")        # octet out of range
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("01.2.3.4")          # leading zero not allowed
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("a.b.c.d")           # non‑digit octet
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("")                  # empty string, not 4 parts

from target import parse_ipv4
import pytest

def test_parse_ipv4():
    # Valid typical addresses
    assert parse_ipv4("192.168.0.1") == (192, 168, 0, 1)
    assert parse_ipv4("0.0.0.0") == (0, 0, 0, 0)
    assert parse_ipv4("255.255.255.255") == (255, 255, 255, 255)

    # Edge cases: leading zeros not allowed, trailing dot, wrong octet count
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("01.2.3.4")
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("1.2.3.4.")
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("1.2.3")

    # Out of range and non‑digit octets
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("256.100.100.100")
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("10.0.0.x")
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("")
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        parse_ipv4("...")
